scene_summary: A dark museum-like corridor with multiple visible interactive artifact surfaces: a large checkpoint text wall, a monumental ASCII comet mural, labeled floor test tiles, a glowing confetti voting urn, a sequential horse frieze, listening-station plaques, and smaller inscription panels.
usable_surfaces: red and green floor test threshold tiles
vertical Japanese inscription plaque on left pillar

detected_objects.label: Seven Checkpoints inscription wall
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large matte black wall on the left with clearly readable heading 'SEVEN CHECKPOINTS' and numbered bilingual checkpoint text.

detected_objects.label: ASCII comet mural
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dominant right wall mural made of dense white and blue glyph-like dots forming comet or signal beams.

detected_objects.label: red-green testing threshold tile
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Two colored floor plates across the entrance path, red on the left and green on the right, labeled 'TEST RED' and 'TEST GREEN' with Japanese text.

detected_objects.label: confetti voting urn lantern
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Freestanding illuminated translucent ballot-like box in the foreground, filled with colored confetti and bearing vote-related text.

detected_objects.label: motion cavalry frieze
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Long horizontal wall band on the left corridor showing repeated white horse figures in sequential motion.

detected_objects.label: Susumu Yokota listening alcove panel
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Warm lit vertical panel in the right alcove with readable 'SUSUMU YOKOTA' title and track/year inscriptions.

detected_objects.label: rear circular burst artwork panel
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Framed illuminated panel at the end of the corridor containing a bright circular radiating burst image.

detected_objects.label: left vertical Japanese inscription plaque
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Narrow black plaque on the left entrance pillar with gold border and vertical Japanese text.

detected_objects.label: hero-scale checkpoint inscription wall
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source artifact from the scene brief.

detected_objects.label: hero-scale ASCII comet mural
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source artifact from the scene brief.
